heading: ***WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY THIS EVENING INTO MID-MORNING FRIDAY FOR EAST-CENTRAL AND NORTHEAST VT, AND NORTHERN NH***Today
text: Some early sun far north, then cloudy and much cooler. Early rain or sleet far south ending. A rising chance of rain showers or sleet through NY into western VT late. Highs in the 30s to low 40s, warmest far north and the Champlain Valley. Winds east to southeast near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Rain showers, mixed with sleet or freezing rain from the Green Mountains east. Lows in the 30s, some cold spots north near 30. Winds increasing from the south and southeast 10 to 15 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Isolated freezing rain north changing to rain showers, and a few morning showers south. Then breaks of sunshine, breezy, and much milder. Highs in the 60s, a few upper 50s northeast. Winds south to southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph east, and 45 mph west of the Green Mountains.
